title: Tender Ukrainian Oyster Mushroom Toast
description: A savory, vegan-friendly toast topped with sauteed oyster mushrooms infused with garlic, thyme, and nutritional yeast for a deep umami flavor.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and add minced garlic; sauté for 1 minute until aromatic.
Add sliced oyster mushrooms to the skillet and cook, stirring frequently, until they release moisture and become tender, about 5-6 minutes.
Stir in thyme leaves, nutritional yeast, lemon juice, salt, and pepper; cook another 1-2 minutes until the mushrooms are well coated.
While the mushrooms cook, toast bread slices in a toaster or on a separate skillet until golden brown.
Spread the sautéed mushroom mixture evenly over each toast slice.
Lightly melt vegan butter in a small saucepan and drizzle over the mushroom-topped toast.
Serve immediately while warm; optionally garnish with fresh parsley or additional thyme.
Enjoy this quick, umami-packed snack or light lunch.
